meaning: adj.<古>隐约的,微妙的,敏锐的,狡猾的
examples: Keen observation, subtile insight, judicious inference: with these he discovers, notices, grasps, and comprehends everything.
Actually, some subtile emotion would exist between persons of the same gender, which is more intimate than friendship, but less than love.
This exhibition is co-organized with nonprofit art institutes, academic community and various intellectual observers from all over theworld with subtile observation and independent opinions.
